task_completion.description: Agent created a Python script that imports and uses PySAM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a Python script with `import PySAM` or similar PySAM module imports (e.g., `import PySAM.Pvwattsv8`).

task_completion.description: Agent configured the PySAM model with the specified system parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing the setup of the PySAM model with parameters like weather file path (`phoenix_az_tmy.csv`), system capacity (`50000`), array type (`2`), DC-to-AC ratio (`1.2`), inverter efficiency (`96.0`), and system losses (`14.08`).

task_completion.description: Agent implemented the LCOE calculation using the provided formulas and constants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing calculations for land area (using `333333.33` and `4046.86`), total capital cost (adding base `50000000` and land cost at `60000`/acre), annualized cost (using `0.08` and `750000`), and LCOE.

task_completion.description: Agent set up a loop or sequence to test the five required GCR values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing a loop iterating over `[0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7]` and updating the GCR parameter in the PySAM model for each iteration.

task_completion.description: Agent exported the final results to the specified JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing the results being written to `/home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/gcr_optimization.json` using `json.dump`, or a terminal output showing the contents of the generated JSON file with keys for project location, system capacity, optimal GCR, and a results array.

integrity.description: Agent executed the Python script to generate the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of the Python script (e.g., `python script.py`) without errors, or the presence of the generated JSON file.

integrity.description: Agent calculated the annual energy and LCOE dynamically rather than hardcoding the final answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Python script contains the actual PySAM execution (`model.execute()`) and math formulas, without hardcoded annual energy values or the optimal GCR (0.5) pre-written in the JSON output.

integrity.description: Agent used PySAM to simulate the energy output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script extracts the annual energy from the PySAM model's outputs (e.g., `model.Outputs.annual_energy`) to use in the LCOE calculation.
